# Fieldnotes

> Personal writing, projects, and field notes by the site author.

## Essays
Essays on software, technology, and the craft of building things.
Available at /essays — each essay has a .md format for plain text access.

## Now
What I'm working on right now: /now

## Builds
A catalog of businesses, open-source projects, and media channels: /builds

## Books
What I'm reading and key ideas from each book: /books

## Field
Photo and video expedition series: /field

## Feeds
- RSS: /feed.rss
